name: touch-grass-figma-code-bridge
intent: Display-ready data model for AI-driven case studies that explain code-to-figma and figma-to-code flow.

code_to_figma.proof: One semantic token contract across web, figma, and iOS

code_to_figma.target: Figma component sets on P* and X* pages
code_to_figma.proof: Variant/state parity between React API and Figma variants

code_to_figma.target: F8 · BRAND and related foundation cards
code_to_figma.proof: Brand visuals remain token-driven and theme-safe

figma_to_code.source: Figma variables + component sets + narrative pages
figma_to_code.proof: No design-only fix is accepted without a corresponding code action when parity is broken
Changes are reviewable, reproducible, and releasable

figma_to_code.transform: regenerate outputs and mirror back to Figma
figma_to_code.proof: Round-trip closes with no unresolved drift

translation_contract.rule: Figma variable codeSyntax must match CSS variable names exactly

translation_contract.figma: Variant and State axes in Button component set

translation_contract.rule: State semantics must be explicit on both surfaces

translation_contract.figma: Imported vectors bound to semantic color vars

case_study_payload.core_question: Can this design system prove implementation and design stay in lockstep?
